news.t: Vanguard Expands Fixed Income Lineup With New High Yield ETF

overview.description: The Vanguard High-Yield Active ETF (VGHY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF, investing primarily in US high-yield corporate bonds. The fund may also hold leveraged loans and select investment grade credits for added flexibility VGHY was launched on Aug 27, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Vanguard Expands Fixed Income Lineup With New High Yield ETF
data.text: On June 4, Vanguard launched the Vanguard U.S. High-Yield Corporate Bond Index ETF (VCHY) on the Cboe BZX. VCHY provides ultra-low-cost exposure to higher-yield U.S. corporate bonds.
